imageAlt: Suggest an Invoice or Bill from Banking roadmap item preview image
title: Suggest an Invoice or Bill from Banking
summaryBody: When transactions can’t be categorised because an invoice or bill doesn’t yet exist, suggest an invoice or bill and allow the users to create the bill or invoice and explain the transaction in minimal clicks.
detailBody: When transactions can’t be categorised because an invoice or bill doesn’t yet exist, suggest an invoice or bill and allow the users to create the bill or invoice and explain the transaction in minimal clicks.
